name: Repulsion Shield
description:
You gain a +1 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB} while wielding this shield.
The shield has 4 charges. While holding it, when a Large or smaller creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack roll, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to expend 1 of the shield's charges and push the attacker up to 15 feet straight away. The shield regains {@dice 1d4} expended charges daily at dawn.
